authorization_phrase_detected: YES start P180 combined reconciliation and replay backlog plan only

current_split_summary.split_origin: zen-gates worktree contains P149-P178A research chain; main branch reflects older production state
code_only_in_main: P149-P159B replay product implementation (API, UI, scripts)
production governance chain artifacts prior to zen-gates worktree creation

reconciliation_options.label: Promote zen-gates branch to canonical mainline
reconciliation_options.description: Merge zen-gates worktree branch (claude/zen-gates-ff6802) into main, treating zen-gates as the canonical state. DB and code both follow zen-gates.
pros: Resolves all divergence in one step
zen-gates has complete bet_index schema and all P149-P179 artifacts
All 1122 contract tests would run against production DB
cons: Requires careful merge conflict resolution (code present in main not in zen-gates)
DB migration from main 54462 to zen-gates-equivalent 94924 is a separate step
Cannot be done without explicit merge authorization and DB backup plan
reconciliation_options.requires_authorization: Exact merge authorization phrase + DB migration plan + backup rehearsal

reconciliation_options.label: Backport code/docs/tests only to main, DB migration separate
reconciliation_options.description: Copy analysis scripts, test contracts, roadmap documents, and research artifacts from zen-gates to main without any DB changes. DB migration is deferred as a separate authorized task.
pros: Tests and docs immediately available in main
cons: test_p161-p179 contract tests will fail against main DB (54462 rows, no bet_index) until DB migration
reconciliation_options.requires_authorization: Exact branch merge/copy authorization + per-file review

reconciliation_options.label: Controlled DB migration plan from main 54462 to zen-gates-equivalent 94924
reconciliation_options.description: Plan for migrating main branch DB to match zen-gates state: add bet_index column, insert 40462 missing rows, verify schema and row counts.
pros: Enables full test suite to run in production
cons: HIGH risk — requires backup, rehearsal, rollback plan, exact authorization
40462 rows delta and schema change must be carefully staged
Production DB mutation — irreversible without backup
reconciliation_options.requires_authorization: DB backup confirmation + rehearsal script + exact migration authorization phrase + rollback plan

reconciliation_options.label: Maintain documented divergence temporarily
reconciliation_options.description: Accept the zen-gates / main split as temporary, document it clearly, and continue research/work only in zen-gates worktree until a full reconciliation plan is authorized.
pros: Buys time to plan A1/A2/A3 carefully
All active work is already in zen-gates worktree
reconciliation_options.risk_level: LOW — for now; risk grows with time
reconciliation_options.requires_authorization: No authorization needed to maintain status quo

required_future_authorization_chain.merge_to_main: Exact authorization phrase required for any merge. No autonomous merge.
required_future_authorization_chain.db_migration: DB backup confirmation + rehearsal run + exact migration authorization phrase. Must specify source, target, row count delta, schema change.
required_future_authorization_chain.controlled_apply: Per-step exact authorization for any controlled_apply. No batch authorization.
required_future_authorization_chain.schema_change: Explicit column-level authorization for any schema change (e.g., adding bet_index to main).

risk_assessment.schema_mismatch_risk: HIGH — main DB missing bet_index column; all P161-P179 contract tests assume bet_index present
risk_assessment.row_count_drift_risk: HIGH — 40462 row delta; any drift detection will flag mismatch
risk_assessment.artifact_test_parity_risk: MEDIUM — tests/test_p161-p179 exist only in zen-gates; main has 0 of these test files
risk_assessment.production_governance_risk: HIGH — main branch holds P149-P159B production governance chain not fully present in zen-gates

acceptance_criteria_for_reconciled_state.tests_target: All P161-P179 contract tests pass against production DB
acceptance_criteria_for_reconciled_state.code_parity_target: All analysis scripts and test contracts present in main branch
acceptance_criteria_for_reconciled_state.roadmap_docs_target: active_task.md, roadmap.md, CTO-Analysis.md current in main branch

part_b_replay_backlog_plan.title: Replay Product Backlog Audit Plan (Plan Only)

backlog_categories.description: Sync P149-P159B production governance chain and research artifacts to main branch. Resolve main/zen-gates split.
backlog_categories.priority: P0 — blocks future release of any replay improvements

DB migration plan for main (54462 → 94924 rows, add bet_index)
Verify drift guard passes in production environment

items: Multi-bet prediction display (Bet 1 through Bet 5) in replay UI
bet_index filter in replay UI
Lifecycle status labels with explanation tooltips
Provenance source display (GENERATED vs ARTIFACT vs LEGACY_UNVERIFIED)

backlog_categories.description: API contract improvements for replay endpoints.
items: Expose bet_index in replay API response
Pagination for large strategy result sets
Structured error responses for missing draw data

backlog_categories.description: Documentation and monitoring for production operators.
items: Operator guide for replay product interpretation

Incident response playbook for DB row count anomalies

P117 POWER_LOTTO OOS monitoring (needs 40 new draws; currently 0)
P118 BIG_LOTTO quarantine (needs exact authorization phrase)
POWER_LOTTO passive monitoring (needs >=500 new draws after 115000041)

h6_gate_mk20_ew85: ONLINE but zero replay rows — requires investigation

part_d_cto_recommendation.primary: Code/docs/tests parity plan (A2 backport) before any production DB migration
part_d_cto_recommendation.secondary: Replay product backlog audit execution (starting with B-P0-1 and B-P1-1)
part_d_cto_recommendation.db_migration_policy: DB migration (A3) only after: detailed migration plan, dry-run rehearsal, DB backup, and explicit per-step authorization phrase. Never autonomous.
part_d_cto_recommendation.do_not_reopen_power_lotto: POWER_LOTTO research remains CLOSED per P178A. Do not restart without meeting reopen conditions.
part_d_cto_recommendation.do_not_deploy: No deployment or champion promotion from P180.
part_d_cto_recommendation.recommendation_text: The highest near-term risk is the main/zen-gates code divergence — specifically, the 1122 contract tests and research artifacts existing only in zen-gates. An A2 backport (code/docs/tests only, no DB change) resolves most of the documentation and test coverage gap at low risk. DB migration (A3) should follow only after a full rehearsal plan is designed and authorized. For the replay product backlog, multi-bet display (B-P1-1) and operator documentation (B-P2-1) are low-risk, high-value items.
